projectMerge.pageDescription: Merge multiple projects into the selected master project and preserve the recording track.

form.title: Merge Process
form.description: Select the target project, check the source projects and save the merge.
form.disabledDescription: Project merging is currently disabled because it is turned off in the Aqua Settings screen.

history.empty: There is no project merge record yet.

toast.saveFailed: Project merge could not be completed.
